allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('severity:',d['severity']\); print\('spr metrics keys:', list\(d['spr']['metrics'].keys\(\)\)\); print\('headings:', [l for l in d['governance'].split\(chr\(10\)\) if l.startswith\('##'\)]\); print\('---len:',len\(d['governance']\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('days_of_cover:', d['metrics']['days_of_cover_remaining'], '| covered%:', d['metrics']['shortfall_covered_pct'], '| inventory pts:', len\(d['daily_inventory']\)\)")
